ingredients_text: white chocolate flavour coating (96%) [sugar, cocoa butter, skimmed milk powder, corn syrup solids, lactose (milk), vegetable oil (palm, and/or shea, and/or sunflower oil), milk fat, emulsifiers (soya lecithin (e322), polyglycerol polyricinoleate (e476) from castor bean oil), artificial flavour (vanillin)], strawberry flakes (4%) [sugar, fruits solids (strawberry), corn starch, natural colour (beetroot red juice and concentarte),  natural and artificial flavour (strawberry)],
